semanticCore: Half, middle, equity, service, turban, or partition
quranicRelevance: Half portion of inheritance/dowry (Nisf - 'wa lakum nisfu ma taraka', 'fanisfu ma faradhtum').
figurativeOrRareUsages: تَقُومُ أَدْنَىٰ مِنْ ثُلُثَيِ اللَّيْلِ وَنِصْفَهُ (73:20): You stand (in prayer) less than two-thirds of the night and (sometimes) half of it.
discardedNoise: Equity and fairness (Insaf) in modern judiciary terminology.
Turban (Minsaf) descriptions in ancient desert fashion.
summaryEn: The root refers to the mathematical division of a half (Nisf), dividing inheritance shares, dowry payments, and night prayer times.
summaryAr: يشير هذا الجذر إلى القسمة الرياضية للنصف (نصف)، ضابطاً حصص الإرث، وقسمة المهر عند الطلاق، وتقسيم وقت قيام الليل.
rawText: أَنَصَفَهُ 4 He did justice to him: (MA:) he acted equitably with him: (Msb:) he gave him, or obtained for him, his right, or due, from (مِنْ) another: see أَعْذَرَ. === إِنْصاَفٌ The giving what is right, or due: (M:) or the granting, or rendering, justice. (KL, PS.) === أَنْصَفَهُ مِنْ ظَالِمِهِ [He exacted justice for him from his wronger]. (T voce ظَلَّمَ.) أَنْصاَفُ اللَّبِنِ [Half-bricks, or] cut bricks, whereof the one is placed, in building, beside the whole brick, for the purpose of ornamentation. (Msb in art. خرج.) اِنْتَصَفَ مِنْهُ 8 He exacted, or obtained, his right, or due, from him (M, K) completely, so that each of them became on a par with the other; (K;) [i. e. with equity]. === اِنْتَصَفَ It became halved: (Msb:) [often said of the daytime (النَّهَارُ)]. طُبِخَ عَلَى النِّصْفِ , and أُصْلِحَ على النصف, It (wine) was boiled until half of it had gone, or evaporated. (TA, voce طَابَة.) مَكَانٌ نَصَفٌ بَيْنَ مَكَانَيْنِ [A place half-way, midway, or equidistant, between two places]. (Mughnee in art. سَوَآءٌ.) === نَصَفٌ A middle-aged woman or man: (S, K:) or forty-five years old: or fifty years old. (K.) Dim. نُصيف. مَنَاصَفٌ Not wholly ripe: [half-ripe:] applied to the date. (TA, voce بُسْرٌ.) مُنَصَّفٌ Expressed juice, (Mgh, Msb,) or wine, or beverage, (K,) cooked until half of it has gone [by evaporation]. (Mgh, Msb, K.) نَصِيفٌ A woman's muffler: see خِمَارٌ. نُصَيْفٌ , dim. of نَصَفٌ: see خَلَيْقٌ voce خَلَقٌ.
